title: bidens cordylocarpa
intro: Bidens cordylocarpa, also known as the hairy beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Bidens cordylocarpa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, poultices, or topical creams for various health applications.
